meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Build SaaS Apps Without Experience
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between student coding and professional SaaS development. Master Claude Code and Antigravity with this high-impact, intermediate-level checklist.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'no SaaS knowledge' barrier, you must master the AI-assisted development workflow. By integrating Claude Code for iterative logic and Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding, you transform from a student learner into an AI-augmented engineer capable of shipping production-grade SaaS features in a fraction of the time.
content.intro:
The gap between writing a script and shipping a SaaS product feels like a chasm. You have the logic, but the architecture, deployment, and infrastructure feel like a mountain of unknown variables. Most students get stuck in 'tutorial hell,' never realizing that the industry has shifted toward AI-native development.

This guide isn't about code snippets; it is about infrastructure leverage. We are using Claude Code as your lead architect and Antigravity to define your project boundaries. By the end of this checklist, you will move from 'learning to code' to 'building businesses,' turning your machine into a high-velocity product engine.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the SaaS core. Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready file structure that supports scalable authentication and database schemas.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional SaaS directory structure using TypeScript, Next.js, and Supabase, including modular components and API route handling.

steps.title: Contextual Knowledge Injection
steps.description: Feed your project constraints into Claude Code so it understands your specific tech stack and coding standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claudecoderules file that enforces clean code principles, strict TypeScript typing, and modular component architecture.

steps.title: Rapid CRUD Implementation
steps.description: Automate the repetitive boilerplate of creating database models and API endpoints to focus on feature logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD API for a 'UserDashboard' feature including validation, database inserts, and error handling patterns.

steps.title: Unit Testing & Security
steps.description: Ensure your code is production-grade by having Claude Code write and execute tests against your new features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive Jest test cases for the UserDashboard API, focusing on edge cases and security vulnerabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'write and run tests for dashboard API'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Bridge the gap to the public web by configuring your CI/CD pipeline for automated deployments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel for this specific repository structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'configure CI/CD for Vercel deployment'

pro_tips: Always use a .claudecoderules file to force the AI to follow your preferred naming conventions and architectural patterns.
Treat Claude Code as a peer programmer, not a tool; ask it to explain its design decisions to deepen your own understanding.
Use Antigravity to map out database relationships before writing a single line of application code.
Maintain a 'knowledge base' folder in your repo; Claude Code will index these files to provide highly contextual suggestions.
Break your SaaS features into micro-tasks; Claude Code performs significantly better when solving one logical unit at a time.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is set up, deploy your first MVP to Vercel and share your link in our community showcase to receive professional peer reviews.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the workflow, and the roadmap. Stop waiting for permission to build the future you want to see. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
